documents.title: Group HR Mission
documents.content: Three jobs only: (a) identify and develop talent across the portfolio, (b) increase inter-brand mobility, (c) support — not impose on — brand DNA. Clause (c) is non-negotiable; HR proposals that violate brand autonomy are rejected at Group level regardless of efficiency gains.

documents.title: Competency Framework — Vision, Entrepreneurship, Passion, Trust
documents.content: VEPT is the lingua franca for senior talent reviews across all houses. Vision: ability to see five years ahead. Entrepreneurship: builds new revenue lines. Passion: emotional commitment to the craft. Trust: integrity in confidential settings, especially around brand DNA.

documents.title: Inter-Brand Mobility Principles
documents.content: Mobility is encouraged where it strengthens both sending and receiving brand. Required guardrails: minimum 2-year tenure at origin brand, symmetric flow across brands, documented knowledge transfer, opt-out for the receiving brand on cultural fit.

documents.title: Senior Talent Pipeline
documents.content: We map high-potential leaders against the VEPT pillars annually. Stretch assignments inside the home brand come first; cross-brand rotation is reserved for those ready to operate at holding-company level — not a default development step.
